mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_COUPONPOINT (USER_ID, ASSET_TYPE, POINT_AMT, EXPIRY_DT, USE_YN, ISSUED_BY) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{assetType}, #{pointAmt}, #{expiryDt}, #{useYn}, #{issuedBy} )
INSERT INTO POINT_HIST (MCPNT_SN, USER_ID, HIST_TYPE, CHANGE_AMT, ORD_SN, MEMO, ASSET_TYPE) VALUES ( #{mcpntSn}, #{userId}, #{histType}, #{changeAmt}, #{ordSn}, #{memo}, #{assetType} )
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(ph.CHANGE_AMT), 0) FROM POINT_HIST ph WHERE ph.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ( -- 적립/소멸: MCPNT_SN으로 ASSET_TYPE 판별 (ph.MCPNT_SN IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp WHERE mcp.MCPNT_SN = ph.MCPNT_SN AND mcp.ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType} )) OR -- 사용: ASSET_TYPE 컬럼으로 판별 (ph.MCPNT_SN IS NULL AND ph.ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}) )

SELECT ph.POINT_HIST_SN, ph.MCPNT_SN, ph.USER_ID, ph.HIST_TYPE, ph.CHANGE_AMT, ph.ORD_SN, ph.MEMO, ph.REG_DT, mcp.EXPIRY_DT FROM POINT_HIST ph JOIN MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp ON ph.MCPNT_SN = mcp.MCPNT_SN WHERE ph.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ph.REG_DT DESC

SELECT MCPNT_SN, USER_ID, ASSET_TYPE, POINT_AMT, ISSUE_DT, EXPIRY_DT, USE_YN, ISSUED_BY, REG_DT FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ASSET_TYPE != 'COUPON' AND USE_YN = 'N' AND EXPIRY_DT >= TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'MM') AND EXPIRY_DT < TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 2), 'MM') ORDER BY EXPIRY_DT ASC

SELECT mcp.MCPNT_SN, mcp.USER_ID, mcp.ASSET_TYPE, mcp.COUPON_SN, mcp.COUPON_NM, mcp.POINT_AMT, mcp.ISSUE_DT, mcp.EXPIRY_DT, mcp.USE_YN, mcp.ISSUED_BY, mcp.REG_DT, m.USER_NAME FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON mcp.USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE mcp.ASSET_TYPE != 'COUPON' ORDER BY mcp.ISSUE_DT DESC

SELECT mcp.MCPNT_SN, mcp.USER_ID, mcp.ASSET_TYPE, mcp.POINT_AMT, mcp.ISSUE_DT, mcp.EXPIRY_DT, mcp.USE_YN, mcp.ISSUED_BY, mcp.REG_DT, m.USER_NAME FROM MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON mcp.USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE mcp.ASSET_TYPE = 'STUDY_POINT'
AND (LOWER(mcp.USER_ID) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{q}) || '%' OR LOWER(m.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{q}) || '%')
ORDER BY mcp.ISSUE_DT DESC
mapper.sql:
WHERE ph.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ( (ph.MCPNT_SN IS NOT NULL AND mcp.ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}) OR (ph.MCPNT_SN IS NULL AND ph.ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}) )
AND TRUNC(ph.REG_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(ph.REG_DT) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.select:
SELECT ph.POINT_HIST_SN, ph.MCPNT_SN, ph.USER_ID, ph.HIST_TYPE, ph.CHANGE_AMT, ph.ORD_SN, ph.MEMO, ph.REG_DT, mcp.EXPIRY_DT FROM POINT_HIST ph LEFT JOIN MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp ON ph.MCPNT_SN = mcp.MCPNT_SN
ORDER BY ph.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{paginationInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{paginationInfo.screenSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ph.POINT_HIST_SN, ph.MCPNT_SN, ph.USER_ID, ph.HIST_TYPE, ph.CHANGE_AMT, ph.ORD_SN, ph.MEMO, ph.REG_DT, mcp.EXPIRY_DT FROM POINT_HIST ph LEFT JOIN MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp ON ph.MCPNT_SN = mcp.MCPNT_SN WHERE ph.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ( (ph.MCPNT_SN IS NOT NULL AND mcp.ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}) OR (ph.MCPNT_SN IS NULL AND ph.ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}) ) ORDER BY ph.REG_DT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POINT_HIST ph LEFT JOIN MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp ON ph.MCPNT_SN = mcp.MCPNT_SN
SELECT USER_NAME FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT NVL(SUM(ph.CHANGE_AMT), 0) AS "totalBalance", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ph.CHANGE_AMT > 0 AND TO_CHAR(ph.REG_DT, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') THEN ph.CHANGE_AMT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "issuedThisMonth", NVL(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN ph.CHANGE_AMT < 0 AND TO_CHAR(ph.REG_DT, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') THEN ph.CHANGE_AMT ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS "consumedThisMonth", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ph.REG_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') THEN ph.CHANGE_AMT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "prevMonthBalance" FROM POINT_HIST ph LEFT JOIN MEMBER_COUPONPOINT mcp ON ph.MCPNT_SN = mcp.MCPNT_SN WHERE NVL(mcp.ASSET_TYPE, ph.ASSET_TYPE) = #{assetType}
